predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN dsd.type_of_area = 'Rural' THEN dsd.sub_district_id END) AS rural_count, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN dsd.type_of_area = 'Urban' THEN dsd.sub_district_id END) AS urban_count

    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
